retrieved_result: About egg laying hens "About egg laying hens The natural behaviours of hens include foraging for food, nesting, roosting, and dust-bathing Going to work on an egg may be out of fashion, but we eat one egg approximately every other day. In total, the UK alone consumes over 30 million eggs per day. High production value
